engine_context.landed_cost_formula: ((P x FX) + S + D) x (1 + GST)
calculation_notes: Singapore low-value goods imported by air or post are modeled with 9% GST.
Local-stock examples do not add import GST in landed total.
Cache entries are seeded examples intended to stress-test UI ranking and filtering until live Tinyfish runs are stable.
